scripts.seed:calendario: sanity dataset import seed/comun-estatal-2026.ndjson calendario --replace && sanity dataset import seed/cataluna-2026.ndjson calendario --replace && sanity dataset import seed/esqueletos-ccaa.ndjson calendario --replace
scripts.datasets:setup: sanity dataset list && echo '\nSi no existe "cima":  npx sanity dataset create cima --visibility public\nSi production sigue ahí: npx sanity dataset rename production calendario && npx sanity dataset visibility calendario public'
